requirement_topic.en: Import Conformity Assessment — PEC / Verification of Conformity (VoC) and Certificate of Conformity (Senegal, Ministry of Trade)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口合格评定——PEC/合格验证（VoC）及合格证书（塞内加尔，贸易部）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口合格評定——PEC/合格驗證（VoC）及合格證書（塞內加爾，貿易部）

summary.en: Senegal applies an import conformity-assessment programme （commonly a Programme for Evaluation of Conformity / Verification of Conformity, PEC/VoC） for regulated imported products, administered for the Ministry of Trade through appointed conformity-assessment bodies. For regulated electrical products such as household refrigerators, the importer typically must obtain a Certificate of Conformity （CoC） demonstrating that the consignment meets the applicable NS/IEC standards （e.g. NS/IEC 60335-2-24） before customs clearance at the Port of Dakar. Conformity is usually demonstrated through one of the programme's routes — consignment inspection, registered/licensed product schemes, or recognition of a valid test report/certificate （e.g. an IECEE CB Scheme report） — plus, where applicable, pre-shipment inspection. The CoC is the key clearance document; without it, customs may block or delay release. The exact product scope, route, and CoC requirement should be confirmed with the appointed conformity-assessment body and the importer for the specific HS code and shipment.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔对受监管的进口产品实行进口合格评定项目（通常为合格评定项目/合格验证，PEC/VoC），为贸易部经指定的合格评定机构管理。对于家用电冰箱等受监管的电气产品，进口商通常须在达喀尔港清关前取得合格证书（CoC），证明该批货物符合适用的NS/IEC标准（如NS/IEC 60335-2-24）。合格性通常通过该项目的某一路径证明——批次检验、注册/许可产品方案，或对有效检测报告/证书（如IECEE CB体系报告）的承认——并在适用时辅以装运前检验。CoC为关键清关文件；缺少CoC，海关可能扣留或延迟放行。具体产品范围、路径及CoC要求应就具体HS编码及货运向指定的合格评定机构及进口商确认。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾對受監管的進口產品實行進口合格評定項目（通常為合格評定項目/合格驗證，PEC/VoC），為貿易部經指定的合格評定機構管理。對於家用電冰箱等受監管的電氣產品，進口商通常須在達喀爾港清關前取得合格證書（CoC），證明該批貨物符合適用的NS/IEC標準（如NS/IEC 60335-2-24）。合格性通常通過該項目的某一路徑證明——批次檢驗、註冊/許可產品方案，或對有效檢測報告/證書（如IECEE CB體系報告）的承認——並在適用時輔以裝運前檢驗。CoC為關鍵清關文件；缺少CoC，海關可能扣留或延遲放行。具體產品範圍、路徑及CoC要求應就具體HS編碼及貨運向指定的合格評定機構及進口商確認。

standards_or_laws: Senegal import conformity-assessment programme (Programme for Evaluation of Conformity / Verification of Conformity, PEC/VoC) — administered for the Ministry of Trade via appointed conformity-assessment bodies
Certificate of Conformity (CoC) — required clearance document for regulated products at the Port of Dakar (Senegal Customs / Douanes senegalaises)
NS/IEC standards (e.g. NS/IEC 60335-2-24) — technical basis assessed within the programme; IECEE CB Scheme reports commonly recognised

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification （CCC）, a mandatory third-party certification covering safety （GB 4706.13） and EMC （GB 4343.1）, administered by CNCA-designated certification bodies before domestic sale; energy labelling （China Energy Label based on GB 12021.2） is a separate domestic requirement. These are domestic market-entry controls for China and do not, by themselves, satisfy a foreign import conformity-assessment programme. China has no outbound equivalent that pre-clears products for the Senegalese import process; the Chinese CCC certificate may, however, support recognition of test data within Senegal's programme where IEC-based reports are accepted.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具须取得中国强制认证（CCC），即涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的强制性第三方认证，由CNCA指定认证机构在国内销售前审核；能效标识（基于GB 12021.2的中国能效标识）为单独的国内要求。这些是中国的国内市场准入管控，单凭其本身不满足外国进口合格评定项目。中国没有为塞内加尔进口流程预先放行产品的对外等效制度；不过，在塞内加尔项目承认基于IEC的报告时，中国CCC证书可有助于其检测数据的承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具須取得中國強制認證（CCC），即涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的強制性第三方認證，由CNCA指定認證機構在國內銷售前審核；能效標識（基於GB 12021.2的中國能效標識）為單獨的國內要求。這些是中國的國內市場准入管控，單憑其本身不滿足外國進口合格評定項目。中國沒有為塞內加爾進口流程預先放行產品的對外等效制度；不過，在塞內加爾項目承認基於IEC的報告時，中國CCC證書可有助於其檢測數據的承認。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR (domestic market entry)
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: The core market-access gap is the foreign import conformity step that has no Chinese-domestic analogue: （1） the importer must obtain a Senegal Certificate of Conformity （CoC） via the PEC/VoC programme before customs clearance at Dakar — Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not auto-satisfy this; （2） conformity evidence must reference NS/IEC standards （e.g. NS/IEC 60335-2-24）, so an IECEE CB Scheme report greatly eases acceptance, whereas a CCC certificate alone may need supporting IEC-based test data; （3） depending on the programme route, pre-shipment or consignment inspection may apply, adding lead time and cost the China-domestic process does not have; （4） documentation submitted within the programme should be in French （see frigsn-market-access-002）. Manufacturers/importers should engage the appointed conformity-assessment body early to fix the route （registration vs consignment） and the exact CoC evidence list. [NOTE: Senegal's regulated-product list, the appointed conformity-assessment body, and the precise PEC/VoC route for refrigerators should be confirmed with the Ministry of Trade / the body before shipment.]
gap.zh: 核心市场准入差距在于无中国国内类似制度的外国进口合格评定步骤：（1）进口商须在达喀尔清关前通过PEC/VoC项目取得塞内加尔合格证书（CoC）——中国CCC及中国能效标识不自动满足此要求；（2）合格证据须引用NS/IEC标准（如NS/IEC 60335-2-24），故IECEE CB体系报告大大便于被接受，而单凭CCC证书可能须辅以基于IEC的检测数据；（3）视项目路径而定，可能适用装运前或批次检验，增加中国国内流程所没有的前置时间和成本；（4）项目内提交的文件应为法语（见frigsn-market-access-002）。制造商/进口商应尽早与指定的合格评定机构接洽，以确定路径（注册或批次）及确切的CoC证据清单。【注：塞内加尔的受监管产品清单、指定的合格评定机构及电冰箱的具体PEC/VoC路径，应在出货前向贸易部/该机构确认。】
gap.zht: 核心市場准入差距在於無中國國內類似制度的外國進口合格評定步驟：（1）進口商須在達喀爾清關前通過PEC/VoC項目取得塞內加爾合格證書（CoC）——中國CCC及中國能效標識不自動滿足此要求；（2）合格證據須引用NS/IEC標準（如NS/IEC 60335-2-24），故IECEE CB體系報告大大便於被接受，而單憑CCC證書可能須輔以基於IEC的檢測數據；（3）視項目路徑而定，可能適用裝運前或批次檢驗，增加中國國內流程所沒有的前置時間和成本；（4）項目內提交的文件應為法語（見frigsn-market-access-002）。製造商/進口商應盡早與指定的合格評定機構接洽，以確定路徑（註冊或批次）及確切的CoC證據清單。【注：塞內加爾的受監管產品清單、指定的合格評定機構及電冰箱的具體PEC/VoC路徑，應在出貨前向貿易部/該機構確認。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — a Certificate of Conformity via the PEC/VoC import conformity programme is typically required before customs clearance at the Port of Dakar; confirm product scope and route with the appointed body
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China; not an outbound pre-clearance for Senegal

source.publisher: Ministere du Commerce et de l'Industrie (Senegal) / appointed conformity-assessment body

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For regulated imports such as refrigerators, the importer typically needs a Senegal Certificate of Conformity obtained through the PEC/VoC conformity-assessment programme (administered for the Ministry of Trade) before customs clearance at Dakar. Chinese CCC and the China Energy Label do not auto-satisfy this; conformity must reference NS/IEC standards, so an IECEE CB Scheme report is the strongest evidence. Confirm the product scope, programme route, and CoC evidence list with the appointed body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于电冰箱等受监管进口产品，进口商通常须在达喀尔清关前通过PEC/VoC合格评定项目（为贸易部管理）取得塞内加尔合格证书。中国CCC及中国能效标识不自动满足此要求；合格性须引用NS/IEC标准，故IECEE CB体系报告为最有力证据。须在出货前向指定机构确认产品范围、项目路径及CoC证据清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於電冰箱等受監管進口產品，進口商通常須在達喀爾清關前通過PEC/VoC合格評定項目（為貿易部管理）取得塞內加爾合格證書。中國CCC及中國能效標識不自動滿足此要求；合格性須引用NS/IEC標準，故IECEE CB體系報告為最有力證據。須在出貨前向指定機構確認產品範圍、項目路徑及CoC證據清單。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer + French-Language Documentation, Labelling and Instructions (Senegal)
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商 + 法语文件、标识及说明书（塞内加尔）
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商 + 法語文件、標識及說明書（塞內加爾）

summary.en: Goods entering Senegal must be imported through an established in-country importer/economic operator, who is the responsible party for customs clearance, the import conformity process （PEC/VoC, see frigsn-market-access-001）, and local market obligations. French is the official language of Senegal, so product documentation — user instructions, safety information, the rating/marking plate content, warranty and after-sales information, and any energy-information notice — must be available in French. Refrigerant safety information and charge declaration （R-600a, see frigsn-refrigerant-001） must likewise be provided in French. Labelling should identify the product, the manufacturer, and the importer. Senegal does not operate EU-style horizontal regimes such as RoHS （restriction of hazardous substances）, a battery-take-back/EPR directive, or an outdoor-noise marking regime for these appliances; obligations instead flow through the import conformity programme, NS/IEC product standards, and consumer-protection/labelling rules administered by the Ministry of Trade.
summary.zh: 进入塞内加尔的货物须通过设立于当地的进口商/经济运营商进口，由其作为清关、进口合格评定流程（PEC/VoC，见frigsn-market-access-001）及本地市场义务的责任方。法语为塞内加尔官方语言，故产品文件——使用说明书、安全信息、铭牌/标识内容、保修及售后信息，以及任何能效信息说明——须提供法语版本。制冷剂安全信息及充注量声明（R-600a，见frigsn-refrigerant-001）同样须以法语提供。标识应标明产品、制造商及进口商。塞内加尔不实行欧盟式的横向制度，如RoHS（有害物质限制）、电池回收/EPR指令，或针对此类器具的户外噪声标识制度；相关义务转而通过进口合格评定项目、NS/IEC产品标准及贸易部管理的消费者保护/标识规则实现。
summary.zht: 進入塞內加爾的貨物須通過設立於當地的進口商/經濟運營商進口，由其作為清關、進口合格評定流程（PEC/VoC，見frigsn-market-access-001）及本地市場義務的責任方。法語為塞內加爾官方語言，故產品文件——使用說明書、安全資訊、銘牌/標識內容、保修及售後資訊，以及任何能效資訊說明——須提供法語版本。製冷劑安全資訊及充注量聲明（R-600a，見frigsn-refrigerant-001）同樣須以法語提供。標識應標明產品、製造商及進口商。塞內加爾不實行歐盟式的橫向制度，如RoHS（有害物質限制）、電池回收/EPR指令，或針對此類器具的戶外噪聲標識制度；相關義務轉而通過進口合格評定項目、NS/IEC產品標準及貿易部管理的消費者保護/標識規則實現。

standards_or_laws: In-country importer / economic operator — responsible party for customs clearance and the import conformity process (Senegal Customs / Ministry of Trade)
French-language documentation, instructions, and labelling — French is the official language of Senegal (consumer-protection / labelling rules, Ministry of Trade)
No EU-style horizontal RoHS / battery-EPR / outdoor-noise regime for these appliances — obligations flow through NS/IEC product standards and the import conformity programme

summary.en: Under the Chinese domestic regime, the CCC certificate holder is the responsible party for domestic-market compliance, and product documentation/labelling is provided in Chinese under Chinese labelling and consumer-protection rules. There is no Chinese statutory obligation to appoint a foreign in-country importer or to provide French-language documentation; these are destination-market （Senegal） obligations with no direct Chinese analogue. China does operate substance-restriction rules （China RoHS — Administration of the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products）, but that is a Chinese-market regime and is separate from, and not required by, Senegal （which has no EU-style RoHS for these appliances）.
summary.zh: 在中国国内制度下，CCC证书持有人为国内市场合规的责任方，产品文件/标识依中国标识及消费者保护规则以中文提供。中国法律无委任外国在地进口商或提供法语文件的义务；这些是目的地市场（塞内加尔）的义务，无直接的中国类似制度。中国确实实行物质限制规则（中国RoHS——电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法），但那是中国市场制度，与塞内加尔分立，且非塞内加尔所要求（塞内加尔对此类器具无欧盟式RoHS）。
summary.zht: 在中國國內制度下，CCC證書持有人為國內市場合規的責任方，產品文件/標識依中國標識及消費者保護規則以中文提供。中國法律無委任外國在地進口商或提供法語文件的義務；這些是目的地市場（塞內加爾）的義務，無直接的中國類似制度。中國確實實行物質限制規則（中國RoHS——電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法），但那是中國市場制度，與塞內加爾分立，且非塞內加爾所要求（塞內加爾對此類器具無歐盟式RoHS）。

standards_or_laws: CCC certificate holder — responsible party for China domestic-market compliance (no obligation to appoint a foreign importer)
China RoHS — Administration of the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products (Chinese-market regime; not required by Senegal)

gap.en: Three destination-market obligations with no Chinese-domestic equivalent: （1） In-country importer — a Senegalese established importer/economic operator must handle clearance and the PEC/VoC conformity process; a Chinese exporter cannot place product on the Senegalese market without one. （2） French-language documentation — all user instructions, safety information, rating-plate/marking content, refrigerant declaration, and any energy notice must be in French; Chinese- or English-only documentation is insufficient for the market and may be queried in the conformity process. （3） Horizontal-regime clarity — manufacturers used to EU RoHS, battery-EPR, and outdoor-noise marking should note that Senegal does not impose EU-style horizontal versions of these for refrigerators; compliance instead runs through the NS/IEC product standards and the import conformity programme. This reduces some EU-style documentation burden but does not remove the importer and French-language requirements. Confirm the importer arrangement and the French-documentation checklist with the importer and the conformity-assessment body.
gap.zh: 三项无中国国内等效的目的地市场义务：（1）在地进口商——须由塞内加尔设立的进口商/经济运营商办理清关及PEC/VoC合格评定流程；中国出口商无此进口商即不能向塞内加尔市场投放产品。（2）法语文件——所有使用说明书、安全信息、铭牌/标识内容、制冷剂声明及任何能效说明须为法语；仅中文或仅英文的文件对该市场不足，且可能在合格评定流程中被质询。（3）横向制度的厘清——习惯于欧盟RoHS、电池EPR及户外噪声标识的制造商应注意，塞内加尔对电冰箱不施加欧盟式的横向版本；合规转而通过NS/IEC产品标准及进口合格评定项目实现。这减轻了部分欧盟式文件负担，但并不免除进口商及法语文件要求。须与进口商及合格评定机构确认进口商安排及法语文件清单。
gap.zht: 三項無中國國內等效的目的地市場義務：（1）在地進口商——須由塞內加爾設立的進口商/經濟運營商辦理清關及PEC/VoC合格評定流程；中國出口商無此進口商即不能向塞內加爾市場投放產品。（2）法語文件——所有使用說明書、安全資訊、銘牌/標識內容、製冷劑聲明及任何能效說明須為法語；僅中文或僅英文的文件對該市場不足，且可能在合格評定流程中被質詢。（3）橫向制度的釐清——習慣於歐盟RoHS、電池EPR及戶外噪聲標識的製造商應注意，塞內加爾對電冰箱不施加歐盟式的橫向版本；合規轉而通過NS/IEC產品標準及進口合格評定項目實現。這減輕了部分歐盟式文件負擔，但並不免除進口商及法語文件要求。須與進口商及合格評定機構確認進口商安排及法語文件清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — an in-country importer and French-language documentation/labelling are required for market placement; no EU-style horizontal RoHS/battery-EPR/outdoor-noise regime applies to these appliances
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — no Chinese statutory obligation to appoint a foreign importer or provide French-language documentation; China RoHS is a separate Chinese-market regime

source.publisher: Ministere du Commerce et de l'Industrie (Senegal) / Senegal Customs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] An established in-country Senegalese importer and French-language documentation, instructions, and labelling are required to place refrigerators on the Senegalese market. Chinese- or English-only documentation is insufficient. Senegal does not impose EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery-EPR, or outdoor-noise regimes for these appliances — compliance runs through NS/IEC product standards and the import conformity programme. Confirm the importer arrangement and French-documentation checklist before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在塞内加尔市场投放电冰箱须有塞内加尔设立的在地进口商及法语文件、说明书和标识。仅中文或仅英文的文件不足。塞内加尔对此类器具不施加欧盟式横向RoHS、电池EPR或户外噪声制度——合规通过NS/IEC产品标准及进口合格评定项目实现。须在出货前确认进口商安排及法语文件清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在塞內加爾市場投放電冰箱須有塞內加爾設立的在地進口商及法語文件、說明書和標識。僅中文或僅英文的文件不足。塞內加爾對此類器具不施加歐盟式橫向RoHS、電池EPR或戶外噪聲制度——合規通過NS/IEC產品標準及進口合格評定項目實現。須在出貨前確認進口商安排及法語文件清單。
